Why is this meningitis outbreak so unusual?There have been 20 cases since the weekend in one small area of Kent - but this isn't the normal pattern, so what could have happened? https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqlglkprv0qo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqlglkprv0qo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 16:34:33 GMT
PM swerves questions on whether he spoke to Mandelson over Epstein friendshipConservative leader Kemi Badenoch repeatedly asks if the prime minister spoke to Peter Mandelson about his friendship with Jeffrey Epstein before picking him to be a UK ambassador. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vjv17q0rmo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vjv17q0rmo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 15:01:16 GMT
Fly tippers in England face clearing up own rubbish as punishmentFly tippers could face up to 20 hours of community service removing rubbish they have illegally dumped. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9dn770n1deo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9dn770n1deo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 16:25:27 GMT
Angela Rayner's explosive speech reignites leadership speculationThe ex-deputy PM did not name Keir Starmer in her attack on Labour's direction and policies - but she did not have to. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpd8d10n9x5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cpd8d10n9x5o#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 09:21:14 GMT

Average age of first time buyer in England climbs to 34A new report looks at how conditions have changed for first time buyers since the 1990s. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cge8e2dq9plo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cge8e2dq9plo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 14:00:10 GMT

Extremist preacher Anjem Choudary loses challenge to overturn life sentenceThe ruling means Choudary - considered by security chiefs to be one of the most dangerous men in Britain - cannot leave jail before he is 85. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c87574wn93qo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c87574wn93qo#0 Wed, 18 Mar 2026 15:38:30 GMT
